title: December 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}

'''December 23''' is the 357th day (358th in leap years) of the year. There are 8 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Elaine Baker]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Howie Weed]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Jess Harnell]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Louisa Rawlins]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Sebastian Shaw]] dies.
*[[1998]] – ''[[The Jabba Tape]]'' published.
*2004 – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies|Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided]]'' is released in Japan.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Colossus of Destiny]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 48|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 48]] published.
*2009 – [[Legacy (2006) 43|''Legacy'' (2006) 43]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' released on [[Wikipedia:Android (operating system)|Android]].
*2014 – [[Stay on Target (sourcebook)|''Stay on Target'']] published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 14|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 14]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 13|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 13]] published in Germany.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' short "[[Bucket's Quest]]" released on YouTube.
*[[2020]] – [[Bounty Hunters 8|''Bounty Hunters'' 8]] published.
*2020 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run 1|''Star Wars Adventures: Smuggler's Run'' 1]] published.
*2020 – ''[[The Vow of Silver Dawn]]'' chapters twelve and thirteen are published.
*[[2023]] – [[Barrie Holland]] dies.
*[[2024]] – [[Angus MacInnes]] dies.
*[[2025]]– ''[[Star Wars: The Official Funko POP! Coloring Book]]'' published.
<noinclude>
